name: Erria A/S
summary: Erria A/S engages in shipping and shipping related activities worldwide. It provides ship management services, including technical management, administration, crewing, and quality assurance; and administration consulting, which comprise construction/repair supervision, and other services. The company also offers container services, such as EMR dry repair, EMR reefer, and ECS depot SGN. In addition, it is involved in logistics activities that include container depot handling, and maintenance and repair of containers. The company was formerly known as Rederiet Fabricius A/S and changed its name to Erria A/S in April 2007. Erria A/S was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in K√É¬∏ge, Denmark.
